context: Tests whether the agent supports Ruby's ## YARD-style docstring format and correctly updates it with a new @param entry for the encoding parameter, matching the existing style exactly.

checklist.name: Encoding param documented
checklist.description: lib/processor.rb contains a `# @param encoding` line documenting the new encoding parameter

checklist.name: YARD style preserved
checklist.description: The added documentation uses `# @param encoding [String]` format (with the type annotation in square brackets) — NOT Python or JSDoc format

checklist.name: Existing params untouched
checklist.description: The existing `# @param value [String]` line is unchanged in lib/processor.rb

checklist.name: Return section untouched
checklist.description: The `# @return [String]` line is unchanged — only the new parameter was added

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading
